_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutation expands an EGFR-dependent peripheral nerve progenitor that confers neurofibroma tumorigenic potential.

_contextSnippet: Of spheres which contained positive cells, there was a 10-fold increase in the number of β-Tub+ cell in Nf1−/− spheres versus wild type spheres (2.9% vs 0.27% respectively
details: Detected neuronal differentiation with 10-fold increase in β-Tub+ cells in Nf1−/− spheres versus wild type spheres (2.9% vs 0.27% respectively)
